narrative:
Musk East A (precinct in Washington County) has 869 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.3 percentage points.
